---
title: "test_injection_neutralization.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\augmented_intel\test_injection_neutralization.py"
loc: 18
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.20
style_score: 4.09
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.91
---

## Intent
The `test_injection_neutralization.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestInjectionNeutralization, test_heimdall_guard_basic, test_heimdall_guard_case_insensitivity, test_integration_with_sanitize_code. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestInjectionNeutralization, test_heimdall_guard_basic, test_heimdall_guard_case_insensitivity, test_integration_with_sanitize_code. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.sentinel.code_sanitizer](file://src.sentinel.code_sanitizer)

### Exports
- `TestInjectionNeutralization`
- `test_heimdall_guard_basic`
- `test_heimdall_guard_case_insensitivity`
- `test_integration_with_sanitize_code`
